name: Human-in-the-Loop Support Agent - Email Inbox Ingest

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ {
  event: 'review_required',
  ticketId: $json.ticket.id,
  dashboardUrl: ($env.APP_BASE_URL || 'http://localhost:3000'),
  customerName: $json.ticket.customerName,
  customerEmail: $json.ticket.customerEmail,
  subject: $json.ticket.subject,
  status: $json.ticket.status,
  intent: $json.ticket.intent,
  sentiment: $json.ticket.sentiment,
  priority: $json.ticket.priority,
  reason: $json.reviewRouting.reason,
  n8nExecutionId: $json.ticket.metadata?.n8nExecutionId || $execution.id
} }}
